from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Optional

@dataclass
class RecordSummary:
    id: int
    name: str

@dataclass
class RecordDetail:
    id: int
    name: str
    details: str
    history: list
    permissions: list

def fetch_record(record_id: int) -> Optional[RecordSummary]:
    record = db.get(record_id)
    if record is None:
        return None
    return RecordSummary(id=record.id, name=record.name)

def fetch_record_detail(record_id: int) -> Optional[RecordDetail]:
    record = db.get(record_id)
    if record is None:
        return None
    return RecordDetail(
        id=record.id,
        name=record.name,
        details=record.details,
        history=record.history,
        permissions=record.permissions,
    )

def get_config(key: str) -> str:
    return config_store.read(key)
